description_long: This is a vintage-style brown leather athletic shoe with a low-cut profile and a rounded toe. The upper is made of worn, distressed leather, featuring dark brown laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The shoe has a thin, flat sole with visible metal spikes protruding from the bottom, indicating it is designed for track or field sports. The collar is lined with a lighter, off-white material, and the tongue is slightly padded and extends above the lacing area. The overall appearance suggests significant use, with creases and scuffs visible throughout the leather surface. The shoe lacks any visible branding or logos, giving it a utilitarian, classic look.
description: A vintage brown leather athletic shoe with dark laces and metal spikes on the sole, showing signs of heavy wear and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brown leather upper, dark laces, and the off-white collar lining.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central lacing, and the protruding metal spikes on the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the worn leather surface, lacing, and the low-cut profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, off-white collar lining, and the open back of the shoe.
